description: Send an iMessage/SMS from the user's Messages account. This sends a real message to a real person — always confirm the recipient and text with the user before calling, and never invent phone numbers or addresses.

to.description: Recipient phone number (e.g. +14155551212) or email. Use this OR chat_id.

chat_id.description: Existing chat id from imessage_recent (required for group chats)
